sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Annah guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Annah Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Annah
hero.summary: Her self-healing special and Max HP scaling point cleanly toward a speed-first HP tank shell. From there, branch into the Durability route and the Fast utility route as your gear options widen.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Annah feels best once Speed, HP%, and DEF% are online, giving the first rotation a much steadier payoff.
bullets: Main stats stay on Speed necklace and HP% ring.
Substat focus: Speed, HP%, DEF%, and Effect RES.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Skill investment is cleanest as Special >= Ultimate >= Basic, with the first cooldown setting the pace for the full rotation.

steps.title: Open with Special
steps.detail: Lead with the highest-invested cooldown so the opener starts on the strongest possible breakpoint.

steps.title: Cash in on Ultimate
steps.detail: Ultimate is usually the next meaningful breakpoint once the opener lands and should carry the mid-cycle payoff.

steps.title: Fill with Basic
steps.detail: Use Basic between cooldowns while you keep Speed and HP% stable on gear.

steps.title: Upgrade toward the final target
steps.detail: Budget target is 3 / 3 / 3, with 4 / 7 / 7 as the long-term skill finish.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Start on the Core line with HP (4pc) + Barrier (2pc) and Speed necklace and HP% ring. Move into the Durability route and the Fast utility route once the baseline is stable.

sets.label: Core
sets.note: Core keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

sets.label: Durability
sets.note: Durability keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

sets.label: Fast utility
sets.note: Fast utility keeps SPD on the necklace and HP% on the ring.

priorities: Substats: SPD, HP%, DEF%, Effect Res, Flat HP

targetStats.summary: Lock Speed necklace and HP% ring, then stack  through substats.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough priority: raise copies after the main skill breakpoints are online.
Substat focus: Speed, HP%, DEF%, and Effect RES

items.label: Passive
items.title: Something Smells Delicious!
items.summary: Annah's passive matters more once the core stat line is online and the rotation is already stable.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Please Stop Resisting!
items.summary: Use the basic to bridge cooldowns; it should stay behind the two higher-impact skills in upgrade priority.

items.label: Special
items.title: Quick Bite Before We Start!
items.summary: Special is the first real investment breakpoint for this build and usually defines the early payoff window.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: Arrest Them All!
items.summary: Ultimate still helps anchor the opener, even when the build upgrades Special first.
